---
title: "Map Title Here"
description: "One-sentence description shown on the gallery card."
categories:
  - ggplot2      # library used (ggplot2 / leaflet / tmap / sf / etc.)
  - static       # static or interactive
  - world        # geographic scope (world / europe / usa / city / etc.)
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
# add other packages here
```

## About this map

Brief explanation of what this map shows and why it is interesting.

```{r}
#| label: map
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

# Your map code here.
```
